Reason / Activity: Transmission line maintenance and correction of defects.
Original Post: NGCP SCHEDULED POWER INTERRUPTION!!📢 DATE: DECEMBER 3 and 4, 2025 6:00 AM - 7:00 AM and 5:00 PM - 6:00 PM ACTIVITIES: ☑ Transmission line maintenance and correction of defects. AFFECTED AREA/S: Borongan, Taft, Quinapondan, and Balangiga Substations (entire province) *All substations above will be briefly interrupted for about 30 minutes between 6:00 AM to 7:00 AM on DECEMBER 3, 2025 for the isolation , and another 30 minutes, between 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM on DECEMBER 4, 2025 for the normalization.
